scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,green" --names "api,web,worker,tracker" "bun --cwd api dev" "bun --cwd web dev" "bun --cwd worker dev" "bun --cwd tracker dev"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue" --names "api,web,worker,tracker,mcp" "bun --cwd api dev" "bun --cwd web dev" "bun --cwd worker dev" "bun --cwd tracker dev" "bun --cwd mcp dev"
